summary: Historical Feb deliveries: 2019=49, 2020=55, 2021=32, 2022=49, 2023=46, 2024=49, 2025=40. Jan 2026=19 (slowest start in decade). Feb/Jan ratio historically 1.26-2.30 (mean 1.67). Supply chain issues ongoing (fuselage panels, engines). BofA estimates 10-15 aircraft held up by inspections. 2026 annual target expected ~900. Monte Carlo median: 39, P10=29, P90=49.
content: Historical February deliveries: 49, 55, 32, 49, 46, 49, 40 (2019-2025). Jan 2026 was only 19 due to A320 fuselage panel quality issue and persistent supply chain constraints. Panel issue rectified for new panels but inspections ongoing. Three-scenario model: Upside (30%, mean 47), Base (55%, mean 38), Downside (15%, mean 28). Central estimate ~39 deliveries.
